hypothesis: The best model so far uses tweedie_variance_power=1.5 (WRMSSE=0.94488, exp_0033). Hypothesis: add item_id × store_id interaction encoded as target encoding has been exhausted. Instead, try adding new interaction features: (1) snap × lag_7 (snap day with same-weekday lag), (2) snap × rmean_7 (snap demand context), (3) event_flag × lag_7 (event with recent history), (4) dow × item_enc (day-of-week modulated by item baseline), (5) price_norm_28 × rmean_28 (price discount signal scaled by demand). These multiplicative interactions capture non-linear relationships that tree splits alone may miss. All other settings match best run (exp_0033).
